allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "import src.models; import src.config; import src.orchestrator; print\('Imports OK'\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "
import os; os.environ['GEMINI_API_KEY'] = 'test-key'
from src.config import Settings
s = Settings\(gemini_api_key='test-key', openai_api_key='', anthropic_api_key='', default_model='gpt-4o', fallback_model='gpt-4o-mini'\)
print\('provider:', s.active_provider\)
print\('model:', s.active_model\)
print\('fallback:', s.active_fallback_model\)
")
